---
title: "Page 4 - Methods Page Variant"
id: "mod001-se01-sec06-sp04"
section_id: "mod001-se01-sec06"
session_id: "mod001-se01"
toc: false
---

## Method

_Add a clear explanation of what the method, process, or analytical approach is._

---

## When to use this

_Describe the specific situations or conditions where this method is appropriate._

---

## Steps

_Provide a step-by-step breakdown of how to apply the method correctly._

---

## Example

_Provide a short illustrative example of the method in use._

---

## Limitations and considerations

_Detail any key limitations, assumptions, or risks associated with this approach._

<!-- START_NAVIGATION -->


```{=html}
<div class="custom-page-navigation">
    <div class="nav-prev">
        
        <a href="mod001-se01-sec06-sp03.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">← Previous</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Page 3 - Assessment Page Variant</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
    <div class="nav-next">
        
        <a href="mod001-se01-sec06-sp05.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">Next →</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Page 5 - Case Study Variant</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
</div>
```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
